payload.label: coffee maker
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped silver/gray metal drip-style coffee maker with a cylindrical upper reservoir and a visible glass carafe seated in a black plastic base; dark handle and some surface blur are visible and the countertop-sized unit appears roughly 0.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"coffee maker","short_description":"silver metal coffee maker edge-cropped","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped silver/gray metal drip-style coffee maker with a cylindrical upper reservoir and a visible glass carafe seated in a black plastic base; dark handle and some surface blur are visible and the countertop-sized unit appears roughly 0.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["silver/gray metal body","glass carafe","black plastic base","dark handle","drip-style brewer","partial/edge-cropped","vertical/tall shape","slight blur/noise"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
